name: Atrial Fibrillation Detection (Atrial Fidelity Algorithm) in Pacemakers
description: The Atrial Fidelity algorithm within a pacemaker enhances atrial sensing electrode sensitivity to distinguish true atrial fibrillation from far-field R-wave oversensing. When AF is detected, the device mode-switches from tracking (DDD) to non-tracking (DDI/VVI) to prevent inappropriate high-rate ventricular pacing triggered by fibrillatory atrial signals.
